meaning: still possesses; yet retains (some positive attribute that contrasts w
sentence: 这道菜做得不失水准，还挺好吃。
pinyin: Zhè dào cài zuò de bù shī shuǐ zhǔn, hái tǐng hǎo chī.
english: This dish still maintains its standard — it's actually quite tasty.

sentence: 学生们因为抗议校方政策而罢课一天。
pinyin: Xué sheng men yīn wèi kàng yì xiào fāng zhèng cè ér bà kè yī tiān.
english: The students boycotted classes for one day to protest the school's policy.

sentence: 骑士靴上的马刺在石板路上发出清脆的声音。
pinyin: Qí shì xuē shàng de mǎ cì zài shí bǎn lù shàng fā chū qīng cuì de shēng yīn.
english: The spurs on the knight's boots made a crisp sound on the flagstone road.

sentence: 她年轻时风华绝代，令人印象深刻。
pinyin: Tā nián qīng shí fēng huá jué dài, lìng rén yìn xiàng shēn kè.
english: When she was young, her magnificence was unmatched and left a deep impression on everyone.

sentence: 他每天写日记，藉以整理自己的思路。
pinyin: Tā měi tiān xiě rì jì, jiè yǐ zhěng lǐ zì jǐ de sī lù.
english: He writes in his diary every day as a way to organize his thoughts.
